case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES VS. T&T CONTRACTORS, INC et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF HARDWOOD FLOOR LAYERS LOCAL UNION 1861 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT T&T CONTRACTORS, INC $25,734.80 PRINCIPAL, $618.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $915.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $27,268.30, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.

POS ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD RE-NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITARTION AWARD; MEMO OF P & A; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET; INDEX OF FEDERAL AUTHORITIES AND PROPOSED ORDERS FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF HARDWOOD FLOOR LAYERS LOCAL UNION 1861

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
